states.emptyHint: When you add records, they will show up in this list.

errors.needTenant: Select a club in the header.
errors.noBranches: Add a sport branch in the database first.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: The daily operating snapshot for your club.
dashboard.cardOpsBody: Plan sessions, take attendance quickly, and keep the weekly rhythm visible.
dashboard.cardPeopleBody: Athletes, guardians, groups, and teams stay connected in one calm workspace.
dashboard.cardFinanceBody: Reusable charge items and assigned athlete fees stay explicit and easy to maintain.
dashboard.needTenant: Choose a club to load the command center.
dashboard.financeBody: Track what is overdue, what was collected recently, and who still needs follow-up.
dashboard.scheduleBody: See upcoming workload by group and keep schedule changes visible before they become attendance issues.
dashboard.attendanceBody: Spot the latest pattern quickly so coaches and staff can react early.
dashboard.commandCenterHint: Keep coaching, scheduling, and finance follow-up in one operational overview.
dashboard.recentCollectionsHint: Check the latest payment tempo before you follow up with families.
dashboard.coachesHint: See which active coaches are available for groups, teams, and upcoming work.
dashboard.privateLessonsHint: Watch the next 1-to-1 workload and billing exposure in the same command center.

athletes.title: Athletes
athletes.subtitle: Roster and participation, built for clarity.
athletes.intakeSubtitle: Structured intake for prospects, trials, and active club members.
athletes.editSubtitle: Keep lifecycle, group fit, and family readiness current.
athletes.emptyHint: Add your first athlete to see them here.
athletes.name: Athlete
athletes.teamsHint: Optional squad assignments. Training group stays on the profile.
athletes.teamFilterHint: Showing athletes with an active membership in {{team}}.
athletes.primaryGroupHint: Groups are training cohorts. Team assignment stays optional.
athletes.branchHint: Choose the branch first so groups and optional team paths stay aligned.
athletes.branchReadyHint: {{branch}} is selected. Group and team options will follow this branch.
athletes.intakeIntro: Start with the athlete's basic profile, group fit, and lifecycle status. Guardians, optional team membership, and finance follow-up can be completed right after saving.
athletes.editIntro: Use this form to keep branch, group, and lifecycle status aligned with the athlete's current club journey.
athletes.statusGuideTrial: Use Trial for athletes who are currently evaluating fit before full activation.
athletes.statusGuideActive: Use Active when the athlete is participating normally in club operations.
athletes.statusGuidePaused: Use Paused when the athlete is expected to return but should remain visible for follow-up.
athletes.statusGuideInactive: Use Inactive when participation has stopped and only limited follow-up is needed.
athletes.statusGuideArchived: Use Archived for historical profiles that should no longer appear in day-to-day operations.
athletes.enrollmentSubtitle: See whether this athlete is ready for normal daily operations.
athletes.enrollmentHint: This uses the current profile, guardians, group, optional team assignment, and finance signals instead of creating a separate enrollment bureaucracy.
athletes.readinessGuardianMissing: No primary contact is linked yet.
athletes.readinessGroupMissing: No primary group is set yet.
athletes.readinessTeamOptional: No team assigned. This is valid for group-only athletes.
athletes.readinessFinanceReady: No open balance blocks the current follow-up loop.
athletes.nextActionsClear: This athlete is ready for normal day-to-day follow-up.

guardians.title: Guardians
guardians.subtitle: Parents and trusted contacts, managed as reusable club records.
guardians.emptyHint: Add a guardian once and reuse them across athlete profiles.
guardians.name: Guardian
guardians.linkedAthletesHint: See each athlete connected to this guardian and how they are listed.
guardians.linkedCreateHint: Create the guardian and link them to the athlete in one step.
guardians.noAthletesHint: Open an athlete profile to connect this guardian.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Training cohorts and age buckets — separate from teams.
groups.memberHint: Athletes set a primary group on their profile; teams are optional.
groups.emptyHint: Groups from your branch catalog will appear here.

teams.title: Teams
teams.subtitle: Squads and competitive units linked to branches.
teams.emptyHint: Teams from your branch setup will appear here.
teams.structureHint: Teams are optional squads inside or alongside groups. Athletes can stay group-only.
teams.structureBody: Use teams for match squads or focused sub-groups without forcing every athlete into one.

coaches.title: Coaches
coaches.subtitle: Operational coaching roster for planning, private lessons, and accountability.
coaches.emptyHint: Add your first coach to start assigning groups, teams, sessions, and private lessons.
coaches.searchPlaceholder: Search coach, phone, email, or specialty

training.title: Training sessions
training.subtitle: Calendar-aware planning for groups and optional teams.
training.emptyHint: Create a session to start recording attendance.
training.attendanceHint: Mark the roster quickly and keep the whole session visible at a glance.
training.groupTeamHint: Sessions belong to a group and can optionally target one team inside that group.
training.groupHint: Choose the main training cohort for this session.
training.teamHint: Leave empty for a full-group session.
training.boardHint: Scan the week fast, then jump straight into attendance or session actions.
training.bulkHint: Use safe bulk changes for planned sessions only.
training.seriesHint: Create the smallest useful repeated pattern instead of adding sessions one by one.
training.seriesSkipped_one: {{count}} matching session already existed and was skipped.
training.seriesSkipped_other: {{count}} matching sessions already existed and were skipped.

privateLessons.title: Private lessons
privateLessons.subtitle: Plan, track, and charge 1-to-1 coaching without forcing it through group-session workflows.
privateLessons.emptyHint: Create a private lesson to track coach time, attendance, and related billing.
privateLessons.search: Search athlete, coach, note, or location
privateLessons.financeHint: Use private lessons for premium 1-to-1 work, then jump into finance or communications from the same operating loop.
privateLessons.profileHint: Private lesson history gives staff one clear view of coaching, attendance, and billing for this athlete.

communications.title: Communications
communications.subtitle: Build a clear outreach audience from operations and finance data without overbuilding messaging infrastructure.
communications.emptyHint: Adjust the filters to build a clear target list for families or athletes.
communications.searchPlaceholder: Search athlete, guardian, team, group, phone, or email
communications.audienceHint: Review who is included and why before you draft or export anything.
communications.draftHint: Prepare the subject, body, and contact list here, then copy into your delivery channel of choice.
communications.defaultDraftBody:
Hello,

We are reaching out with an operational update from the club.

Please review the items below and let us know if you need support.

Thank you.
communications.contactListHint: Copy-friendly guardian lines for email, WhatsApp, SMS, or internal follow-up.
communications.noContactLines: No contact lines available for the current audience.
communications.quickHint: See the main family-facing signals for this athlete before you call or message anyone.
communications.financeHint: Use the audience builder to turn overdue or outstanding balances into a clean family contact list.

finance.title: Finance
finance.subtitle: Collections, balances, and club-side fee operations in one clear workspace.
finance.hubBody: Define reusable fee types, assign charges, then record collections against the right athlete balances.
finance.hubChecklist1: Define reusable fee items once, then keep labels and defaults consistent.
finance.hubChecklist2: Assign charges in bulk when the same fee applies across a roster or group.
finance.hubChecklist3: Record real collections so paid, partial, unpaid, and overdue states stay trustworthy.
finance.bulkAssignBody: Select a charge item, choose athletes, and assign fees in one pass.
finance.summaryHint: Understand what is owed, what is overdue, and what was just collected without leaving finance.
finance.totalChargedHint: All assigned fees currently on the books.
finance.totalOutstandingHint: Open balances that still need action.
finance.totalOverdueHint: Balances that are both open and past due.
finance.priorityCollectionsHint: Combine finance urgency with people context before reaching out.
finance.noPriorityCollections: No priority collections at the moment.
finance.recentCollectionsCount: {{count}} collections were recorded in the recent activity feed.
finance.privateLessonCollectionsHint: Track unpaid or missed 1-to-1 work before it turns into staff confusion.
finance.noPrivateLessonCollections: No private lesson follow-up needed right now.

chargeItems.title: Charge items
chargeItems.subtitle: Reusable fee definitions (dues, camp, kit, …).
chargeItems.name: Name
chargeItems.cannotDelete: Charge items in use should be deactivated instead of deleted.

athleteCharges.title: Athlete charges
athleteCharges.subtitle: Fees assigned to individual athletes, with real balance and overdue visibility.
athleteCharges.quickAssignHint: Create a charge directly from the athlete profile.
athleteCharges.profileHint: Recent charges stay visible here so staff can confirm status quickly.
athleteCharges.bulkHint: Apply one charge item to multiple athletes at once.
athleteCharges.periodicHint: Generate recurring monthly or period-based charges safely without creating duplicates for the same athlete and fee item.
athleteCharges.statusManagedByPayments: Paid and partial states are now derived from recorded collections.
athleteCharges.periodicTargetSummaryGroup: All eligible athletes in {{group}} will be checked.
athleteCharges.periodicTargetSummaryTeam: All eligible athletes in {{team}} will be checked.
athleteCharges.periodicDuplicateWarning: already has a charge for this period
athleteCharges.periodicNoDuplicates: No duplicate charges were found for this period.
athleteCharges.paymentHint: Allocate one real payment across the selected athlete's open charges so balances stay trustworthy.
athleteCharges.recentPaymentsHint: Use the latest collection activity as a follow-up checkpoint.

payments.title: Collections
payments.subtitle: Record payments against athlete charges and keep balances trustworthy.
payments.recordHint: Apply one payment to one athlete's open charges. Partial allocations are supported.
payments.selectAthleteFirst: Choose an athlete to load open charges.
payments.allocationExceeded: Allocation cannot exceed the remaining amount.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Operational and financial visibility for scheduling, attendance, and collections.
reports.readyHint: These report surfaces now summarize live operating data for managers and staff.
reports.commandCenterHint: Use this page for manager visibility and finance follow-up, not analytics theater.

collections.title: Collections overview
collections.body: Outstanding, overdue, and recently collected money in one place.

scheduling.title: Scheduling overview
scheduling.body: See upcoming workload by group and keep the week coordinated.

balances.title: Athlete balances
balances.body: Find the athletes who still need action on assigned charges.

privateLessons.title: Private lesson operations
privateLessons.body: Track 1-to-1 workload, attendance, and related billing from the same command center.

communications.title: Communication targeting
communications.body: Turn training and finance signals into a clear family outreach audience.

commandCenter.title: Command center
commandCenter.outstandingHint: Total balance still waiting for action.
commandCenter.overdueHint: Open balance that is already past due.
commandCenter.overdueChargesHint: See the finance priority before you contact families.
commandCenter.recentCollectionsHint: Check whether collection activity is keeping pace.
commandCenter.noOutstandingHint: There is no high-priority finance follow-up right now.
commandCenter.noOverdueHint: No urgent overdue items are visible right now.
commandCenter.noPaymentsHint: Newly recorded collections will show here.
commandCenter.privateLessonsHint: Watch upcoming 1-to-1 work and spot the lessons that still need follow-up.
commandCenter.noPrivateLessonsHint: Planned and completed private lessons will show up here.
commandCenter.communicationHint: Audience counts help staff understand how large the next family outreach batch will be.

reports.privateLessonsHint: Watch the next 1-to-1 workload and billing exposure in the same command center.
reports.communicationsHint: Turn operations and finance signals into a clear target audience for family outreach.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Club profile and preferences.
settings.placeholder: Tenant profile, notifications, and locale defaults will land here after authentication.

landing.headline: Run your club with calm confidence.
landing.sub: One place for groups, teams, schedules, and money — without the clutter.
